messages.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
messages.shareInviteCode: 👥 Share this invitation code with new members:
messages.step1: New person registers on the registration page
messages.step2: On the household selection page, they click "Join Household"
messages.step3: Enter and confirm the invitation code
messages.step4: Done! The person is now a member of your household
messages.clickToShowInviteCode: Click "Show Invitation Code" to invite new members.
messages.memberRemoved: {{name}} has been removed from the household.

household.leaveDescription: You will leave this household. If you are the last active member, the household will be automatically dissolved.
household.leaveConfirmDescription: You are leaving the household "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
household.leftSuccess: You have successfully left the household.
household.dissolvedAfterLeave: Household dissolved – you were the last member.
household.dissolveDescription: Dissolution requires a majority vote ({{needed}} of {{total}} votes). All data will be permanently deleted.
household.dissolveConfirmDescription: You are voting to dissolve "{{name}}". Once {{needed}} of {{total}} members have agreed, the household will be permanently deleted.
household.dissolvedByVote: Majority reached – household has been dissolved.
household.voteRecorded: Your vote has been recorded ({{count}} of {{total}}, needed: {{needed}}).
household.leftWithNewAdmin: {{name}} is now the new admin of the household.
household.transferAdminDescription: Are you sure you want to transfer the admin role to {{name}}? You will lose your management rights for this household.
household.adminTransferred: {{name}} is now the new admin of the household.
